title: teramnus clandestinus
intro: Teramnus clandestinus, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be dried and made into a powder for later use.
